block_01: All you need to begin trading now
block_02: If you are just starting your trading journey, you may have some questions. Which assets to trade? How much funds do you need to begin? How to get trading experience for free? Find answers to these and other important questions in this article to start trading in 2023.
block_06: Can take-profit feature reduce my profits?
block_09: Take-profit feature is aimed at maximizing your profits. It automatically closes trades once the asset price reaches a certain level, which you specified before opening the position. However, you should keep in mind that short-term price fluctuations may work both for you or against you with take-profit. Learn more and get set-up instructions in this article.
